creator: cem@freebsd.org
text: Which geli mode is being used?  Just the ordinary XTS encryption, or one of the authenticated modes?  I agree it sounds like hardware isn't getting used and that's a problem.  I've had other anecdotal reports that aesni on stable/12 isn't accelerating some workloads.  Have you been able to try dtracing aesni to see if the accelerated primitives get hit and/or errors are being emitted?
